trail.content_raw:
Most of the stuff I reblog, I put in my queue and hit shuffle occasionally, to kinda spread stuff out, so it was random that your post started my day. I think I reblogged that one more for the “keep making the world a better place just by being in it.”

I was talking to my bestie last night and we haven’t seen each other in a month and I realized what an eventful month it’s been, for both weal and woe.

Granted, this has been a day too, as you may have seen. But thank you for the care and concern. Is appreciated. 🫂🖤
